summary: Social Media Agorapulse-style interface testing completed. All major features working correctly: 3-column post creation modal (accounts/content/preview), calendar views (Liste/Mois toggle), tabs (Calendrier/Boîte de réception/Comptes), stats cards, orange Agorapulse color (#FF6B35). Pipeline horizontal scroll container is present with proper attributes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Media Agorapulse-style interface is fully functional. All features tested and working.

social_media_page.create_post_button: PASS - Orange button with correct color #FF6B35
social_media_page.tabs: PASS - 3 tabs (Calendrier, Boîte de réception, Comptes)
